response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"CH1 Overshoot and Undershoot","description":"Adds positive overshoot and negative overshoot measurements on CH1, then queries both results.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"s1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":[],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"g2","type":"group","label":"Add Measurements","params":{},"children":[{"id":"s3","type":"write","label":"Add CH1 Overshoot","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS POVERSHOOT"}},{"id":"s4","type":"write","label":"Set Overshoot Source to CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOURCE CH1"}},{"id":"s5","type":"write","label":"Add CH1 Undershoot","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS NOVERSHOOT"}},{"id":"s6","type":"write","label":"Set Undershoot Source to CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:SOURCE CH1"}}]},{"id":"s7","type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"}},{"id":"s8","type":"sleep","label":"Wait for Measurement Update","params":{"duration":0.5}},{"id":"g9","type":"group","label":"Read Results","params":{},"children":[{"id":"s10","type":"query","label":"Read CH1 Overshoot Result","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_overshoot"}},{"id":"s11","type":"query","label":"Read CH1 Undershoot Result","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_undershoot"}}]},{"id":"s12","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":[]}}]}}]}
